arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim's side stepping up interest in Serie A midfield ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly set to ramp up their interest in one of Serie A's finest midfielders as part of Ruben Amorim's overhaul of the playing squad.

arts.ttl: Sporting sack Ruben Amorim’s successor after just eight games
arts.sum: Joao Pereira has seen Sporting slip from six points clear at the top when he took charge to second place in the Portuguese league

arts.ttl: 'I’d love to return to Man Utd to help Ruben Amorim – he's already under pressure'
arts.sum: Jaap Stam has claimed he is open to a return to Manchester United as a coach with the club continuing to struggle, and pressure is already building on Ruben Amorim's shoulders

arts.ttl: Club could test the waters for Manchester United man – Player could be an opportunity for club
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has endured an injury-ravaged season for Manchester United. He is currently out injured and has played only played three games in all competitions for the Red Devils, playing twice in the Premier League. Doubts have now emerged about Shaw’s future and interest from Napoli has been reported by NapoliCalcioLive. The report states that The post Club could test the waters for Manchester United man – Player could be an opportunity for club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sporting sack Ruben Amorim’s replacement after just eight games
arts.sum: João Pereira sacked on Boxing Day after poor run Rui Borges takes over at Portuguese champions Sporting have appointed Rui Borges as head coach, after the Portuguese champions sacked Joao Pereira on Boxing Day. The new head coach has signed a contract until June 2026, with an option to extend a further year. Pereira, who took over after Ruben Amorim’s departure to Manchester United in November, was in charge for eight matches, of which Sporting won just three, suffering successive Champions League defeats and falling to second in the Primeira Liga behind rivals Benfica. arts.ttl: I'm a Man United icon and would love to return - but Ruben Amorim hasn't called me
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim joined the club from Sporting CP to replace Erik ten Hag - making changes to the backroom staff at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Set for Bidding War to Sign ‘One of the Best Wing-Backs in the World’
arts.sum: Manchester United will have to beat Real Madrid in the race to sign Inter Milan's left wing-back Federico Dimarco.

arts.ttl: Sporting CP sack Ruben Amorim successor just one month after Man United move as replacement named
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon have sacked Joao Pereira as their head coach after just eight matches and confirmed his successor

arts.ttl: Man Utd star confirms January transfer possibility
arts.sum: Ten Hag was never able to get the Brazil international to replicate the success that he enjoyed in Amsterdam, and with Ruben Amorim apparently having no place for him in his Man Utd revolution, agent Junior Pedroso has put the player firmly on the market. These clubs wanted to understand the situation for Antony, so I can confirm that there’s concrete interest,” the agent told Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Man United youngsters dealt major blow as Ruben Amorim promotion plan becomes clear
arts.sum: Lee Sharpe has warned that Manchester United's academy stars may have to alter their style of play to break into the first team under new manager Ruben Amorim.
